works.title: Fitbit Enterprise
works.summary: B2B marketing site for Fitbit's enterprise health program. Two-phase migration from WordPress + Gutenberg to Next.js + Contentful, then to Root.js (Preact) for a server-first architecture. Handed off to Google pre-2025.
highlights: Sole frontend lead on two-phase migration: WordPress + Gutenberg → Next.js + Contentful, then → Root.js (Preact) for a 0kB JS server-first architecture
Headless CMS with Contentful — replaced Gutenberg blocks, gave Google's team full content ownership
Full multi-section site including blog migrated and delivered across both phases
works.impact: Full B2B marketing + blog site migrated in two architectural phases and handed off to Google

works.title: iFit
works.summary: Health & fitness streaming platform with over 6 million global members. Frontend lead on SSR marketing pages and blog infrastructure, built with Next.js and Contentstack, deployed on Vercel.
highlights: Built blog section and full SSR infrastructure from scratch — hundreds of WordPress posts migrated and served as individual server-rendered pages
Headless CMS integration with Contentstack enabling marketing team content autonomy without engineering involvement
100% Lighthouse target across all pages, WCAG AAA accessibility
Google Analytics implementation for marketing and conversion tracking
works.impact: SSR infrastructure serving a platform with 6M+ global members

works.title: Rock & Roll Hall of Fame
works.client: Rock and Roll Hall of Fame
works.summary: Consumer museum site on React, Next.js, and WordPress (headless). Led WCAG AAA and Section 508 compliance across all components — above the legally required AA standard.
highlights: Led end-to-end WCAG AAA and Section 508 remediation across all site components
Accessibility work extended to history.org as part of the same engagement
Part of a team that achieved perfect Lighthouse performance scores
works.impact: Full site WCAG AAA compliant across all components

works.title: Degreed
works.summary: B2B learning platform. Built frontend components in a PHP and TypeScript stack.
highlights: B2B SaaS platform with marketing and learning experience pages
Component development in a PHP + TypeScript environment

projects.summary: Rebuilding GEICO's dotcom from the ground up, starting from their internal brand and design system and building the new system itself.
highlights: Built a new enterprise design system from GEICO's internal brand guidelines
Rebuilding geico.com using the new component library
Components documented and published via Storybook for team-wide consumption

projects.summary: Internal AML compliance tooling — data tables built with Lit web components and a React dashboard for anti-money laundering monitoring.
highlights: Data table components built with Lit for high-density compliance data display
React dashboard for internal AML monitoring and reporting
Enterprise-grade component architecture for sensitive financial tooling
